description: Optimize the dashboard load time to ensure it does not exceed 2 seconds for 95th percentile load times.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is loaded WHEN the user accesses the dashboard THEN the load time should be <= 2 seconds for 95th percentile.

description: Reduce API response times to ensure p95 latency does not exceed 200ms.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an API request is made WHEN the request is processed THEN the p95 latency should be <= 200ms.

description: Resolve the memory leak issue in WebSocket connections to prevent server crashes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a WebSocket connection is established WHEN the connection is active for 8 hours THEN memory usage should not exceed 2MB per hour.

description: Implement automated performance regression detection in the CI pipeline to catch regressions before deployment.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a PR is submitted WHEN performance benchmarks are run THEN any regression exceeding 15% in p95 latency should block the merge.

description: Create a public status page to provide customers with real-time performance metrics and historical data.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the status page is accessed WHEN it is live THEN it should display real-time p50/p95/p99 latencies, error rates, and uptime.

description: Implement a mechanism to collect user feedback on performance issues and overall satisfaction.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback form is accessible WHEN users submit feedback THEN it should be recorded and analyzed.

story_title: Set Up Performance Monitoring and Alerting
description: Set up monitoring and alerting for key performance metrics to proactively address issues.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics exceed defined thresholds THEN alerts should be triggered.

description: Conduct a review of the dashboard and status page for accessibility compliance.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the accessibility review is conducted WHEN changes are made THEN the dashboard and status page should meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards.

description: Implement monitoring for key performance metrics to track improvements over time.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics are tracked THEN they should be visualized in a dashboard.

description: Create documentation outlining the changes made to improve performance and their impact.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN performance changes are made WHEN documentation is created THEN it should accurately reflect the changes and their impact.

story_title: Provide User Training on New Features
description: Provide training materials for users to understand new features and performance improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN training materials are created WHEN users access them THEN they should understand the new features and improvements.

story_title: Dashboard load time regressed from 1.2s to 4.8s after v3.2 deploy
description: After deploying v3.2 which included the new charting library migration, the main analytics dashboard p95 load time jumped from 1.2s to 4.8s. The regression affects all dashboard views with more than 10 data series. Roll-back is not feasible as v3.2 includes critical security patches. Root cause appears to be unoptimized SVG rendering in the new charting library.

story_title: API response times degraded 3x after database migration
description: The migration from PostgreSQL 14 to 16 introduced a query planner regression on our most frequent query pattern (time-series aggregation with window functions). p95 API latency went from 120ms to 380ms. Database team suspects the new planner chooses a less efficient join strategy for our partitioned tables.
